title: Fabric Seasons: Nature's Spirit Compat
description: Nature's Spirit compatibility for Fabric Seasons
body:
Fabric Seasons: Nature's Spirit Compat

A simple mod that adds compatibility between Nature's Spirit and Fabric Seasons.

### Description This mods adds compatibility between Fabric Seasons and Nature's Spirit making it so Nature's Spirit's biomes change colors according to the season ### Images
### Other info I chose the colors for each biome a little bit arbitrarily, if you think you could do a better job than I did make a pull request on the public repo!: [https://github.com/Daisy-SMP/fabric-seasons-natures-spirit-compat](https://github.com/Daisy-SMP/fabric-seasons-natures-spirit-compat) For bug reporting please proceed to the mod's GitHub issue tracker: [https://github.com/Daisy-SMP/fabric-seasons-natures-spirit-compat/issues](https://github.com/Daisy-SMP/fabric-seasons-natures-spirit-compat/issues) If you have any other questions or suggestions, feel free to message me on Discord @macuguita
